page_metadata.biotools__summary: ExpressionBlast is a search engine for gene expression data. It allows you to compare your own expression results to over thousands of studies and close to a million samples currently available at GEO, and find other studies (even across species) that have similar (or opposite) expression patterns to your results.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ExpressionBlast is a search engine for gene expression data. It allows you to compare your own expression results to over thousands of studies and close to a million samples currently available at GEO, and find other studies (even across species) that have similar (or opposite) expression patterns to your results.
